name: Lamb Shank Scotch Broth with Pearl Barley
description: A slow-simmered halal lamb shank broth with pearl barley, turnip, leek, and carrots. Classic Scottish technique, fully halal.
keywords: lamb shank recipe, scotch broth, halal soup, pearl barley soup
recipeIngredient: 800 ml reduced-sodium halal beef or lamb stock
200 g (1.5 cups) turnip, peeled and julienned
1 medium leek, white part only, thinly sliced

recipeInstructions.name: Sear the shank
recipeInstructions.text: Heat canola oil in a heavy pot over medium-high heat. Pat lamb shank dry and sear on all sides until deep mahogany, about 3-4 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.

recipeInstructions.name: Build the broth base
recipeInstructions.text: Press cloves into the cut faces of the onion halves. Add onion, halved carrot, and celery to the pot without extra fat. Let sit 2 minutes to pick up colour from the fond.

recipeInstructions.name: Add liquid and aromatics
recipeInstructions.text: Return the shank to the pot. Pour in water and stock. Add bay leaf, rosemary, thyme, and peppercorns. Bring to a strong simmer then reduce to low.

recipeInstructions.name: Skim
recipeInstructions.text: Skim grey foam from the surface every 5 minutes for the first 20 minutes.

recipeInstructions.name: Simmer the shank
recipeInstructions.text: Cook partially covered at a gentle simmer for 1 hour 30 minutes to 2 hours, until the meat pulls away from the bone easily.

recipeInstructions.name: Extract and strain
recipeInstructions.text: Lift out the shank and set aside. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot, pressing on the solids. Discard solids.

recipeInstructions.name: Pull the meat
recipeInstructions.text: Pull the lamb meat off the bone in rough chunks. Discard bone, cartilage, and excess fat.

recipeInstructions.name: Cook the barley
recipeInstructions.text: Bring the strained broth to a simmer. Add rinsed pearl barley and cook uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.

recipeInstructions.name: Add vegetables and meat
recipeInstructions.text: Add turnip, chopped carrots, sliced leek, and pulled lamb. Season with salt and pepper. Simmer 25 to 30 minutes until barley is tender.

recipeInstructions.name: Finish and serve
recipeInstructions.text: Stir in minced parsley. Taste and adjust salt. Ladle into deep bowls.
